# Don't modify this file manually. This file is auto generated from source, and you will lose your changes next time the website is built.
# Head to the `biomejs/biome` repository, and modify the source code in there.
editUrl: "https://github.com/biomejs/website/edit/main/codegen/src/domains.rs"

title: Domains
description: List of available domains
---
## Drizzle
Use this domain with projects using Drizzle.
### Drizzle activation
Enable the **recommended, non-nursery** rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"drizzle": "recommended"
		}
	}
}
```

:::note[No recommended rules]
Since all rules in this domain are nursery rules, no rules will be activated when enabling the domain. You need to enable the single rules.
:::
Enabled the **all** rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"drizzle": "all"
		}
	}
}
```
**Disable** all rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"drizzle": "none"
		}
	}
}
```
### Drizzle dependencies
Enabled when the following dependencies are declared:
- `drizzle-orm`: `>=0.9.0`

### Drizzle rules
Rules that belong to the domain:
- [noDrizzleDeleteWithoutWhere](/linter/rules/no-drizzle-delete-without-where) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [noDrizzleUpdateWithoutWhere](/linter/rules/no-drizzle-update-without-where) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
## Next
Use this domain inside Next.js projects.
### Next activation
Enable the **recommended, non-nursery** rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"next": "recommended"
		}
	}
}
```
Enabled the **all** rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"next": "all"
		}
	}
}
```
**Disable** all rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"next": "none"
		}
	}
}
```
### Next dependencies
Enabled when the following dependencies are declared:
- `next`: `>=14.0.0`

### Next rules
Rules that belong to the domain:
- [noBeforeInteractiveScriptOutsideDocument](/linter/rules/no-before-interactive-script-outside-document)
- [noNextAsyncClientComponent](/linter/rules/no-next-async-client-component)
- [useExhaustiveDependencies](/linter/rules/use-exhaustive-dependencies) (recommended)
- [useHookAtTopLevel](/linter/rules/use-hook-at-top-level) (recommended)
- [useInlineScriptId](/linter/rules/use-inline-script-id) (recommended)
- [noImgElement](/linter/rules/no-img-element) (recommended)
- [noSyncScripts](/linter/rules/no-sync-scripts)
- [noUnwantedPolyfillio](/linter/rules/no-unwanted-polyfillio) (recommended)
- [useGoogleFontPreconnect](/linter/rules/use-google-font-preconnect) (recommended)
- [noHeadElement](/linter/rules/no-head-element) (recommended)
- [noDocumentImportInPage](/linter/rules/no-document-import-in-page) (recommended)
- [noHeadImportInDocument](/linter/rules/no-head-import-in-document) (recommended)
## Playwright
Use this domain inside Playwright test projects. This domain enables rules that help enforce best practices and catch common mistakes when writing Playwright tests.
### Playwright activation
Enable the **recommended, non-nursery** rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"playwright": "recommended"
		}
	}
}
```

:::note[No recommended rules]
Since all rules in this domain are nursery rules, no rules will be activated when enabling the domain. You need to enable the single rules.
:::
Enabled the **all** rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"playwright": "all"
		}
	}
}
```
**Disable** all rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"playwright": "none"
		}
	}
}
```
### Playwright dependencies
Enabled when the following dependencies are declared:
- `@playwright/test`: `>=1.0.0`

### Playwright globals
When enabled, the following global bindings are recognised by Biome:
- `test`
- `expect`

### Playwright rules
Rules that belong to the domain:
- [noPlaywrightElementHandle](/linter/rules/no-playwright-element-handle) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [noPlaywrightEval](/linter/rules/no-playwright-eval) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [noPlaywrightForceOption](/linter/rules/no-playwright-force-option) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [noPlaywrightMissingAwait](/linter/rules/no-playwright-missing-await) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [noPlaywrightNetworkidle](/linter/rules/no-playwright-networkidle) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [noPlaywrightPagePause](/linter/rules/no-playwright-page-pause) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [noPlaywrightUselessAwait](/linter/rules/no-playwright-useless-await) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [noPlaywrightWaitForNavigation](/linter/rules/no-playwright-wait-for-navigation) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [noPlaywrightWaitForSelector](/linter/rules/no-playwright-wait-for-selector) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [noPlaywrightWaitForTimeout](/linter/rules/no-playwright-wait-for-timeout) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [usePlaywrightValidDescribeCallback](/linter/rules/use-playwright-valid-describe-callback) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
## Project
This domain contains rules that perform project-level analysis. This includes our module graph for dependency resolution. When enabling rules that belong to this domain, Biome will scan the entire project. The scanning phase will have a performance impact on the linting process. See the documentation on our [scanner](/internals/architecture/#scanner) to learn more about the scanner.
### Project activation
Enable the **recommended, non-nursery** rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"project": "recommended"
		}
	}
}
```
Enabled the **all** rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"project": "all"
		}
	}
}
```
**Disable** all rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"project": "none"
		}
	}
}
```
### Project rules
Rules that belong to the domain:
- [noPrivateImports](/linter/rules/no-private-imports) (recommended)
- [noUndeclaredDependencies](/linter/rules/no-undeclared-dependencies)
- [noUnresolvedImports](/linter/rules/no-unresolved-imports)
- [useImportExtensions](/linter/rules/use-import-extensions)
- [useJsonImportAttributes](/linter/rules/use-json-import-attributes)
- [noUndeclaredClasses](/linter/rules/no-undeclared-classes) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [noDeprecatedImports](/linter/rules/no-deprecated-imports)
- [noImportCycles](/linter/rules/no-import-cycles)
- [noUntrustedLicenses](/linter/rules/no-untrusted-licenses) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [noUnusedClasses](/linter/rules/no-unused-classes) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [noUndeclaredClasses](/linter/rules/no-undeclared-classes) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
## Qwik
Use this domain inside Qwik projects. This domain enables rules that are specific to Qwik projects.
### Qwik activation
Enable the **recommended, non-nursery** rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"qwik": "recommended"
		}
	}
}
```
Enabled the **all** rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"qwik": "all"
		}
	}
}
```
**Disable** all rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"qwik": "none"
		}
	}
}
```
### Qwik dependencies
Enabled when the following dependencies are declared:
- `@builder.io/qwik`: `>=1.0.0`
- `@qwik.dev/core`: `>=2.0.0`

### Qwik rules
Rules that belong to the domain:
- [noQwikUseVisibleTask](/linter/rules/no-qwik-use-visible-task) (recommended)
- [useImageSize](/linter/rules/use-image-size) (recommended)
- [useJsxKeyInIterable](/linter/rules/use-jsx-key-in-iterable) (recommended)
- [useQwikClasslist](/linter/rules/use-qwik-classlist) (recommended)
- [useQwikMethodUsage](/linter/rules/use-qwik-method-usage) (recommended)
- [useQwikValidLexicalScope](/linter/rules/use-qwik-valid-lexical-scope) (recommended)
- [useQwikLoaderLocation](/linter/rules/use-qwik-loader-location) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [noReactSpecificProps](/linter/rules/no-react-specific-props) (recommended)
## React
Use this domain inside React projects. It enables a set of rules that can help catching bugs and enforce correct practices. This domain enables rules that might conflict with the Solid domain.
### React activation
Enable the **recommended, non-nursery** rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"react": "recommended"
		}
	}
}
```
Enabled the **all** rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"react": "all"
		}
	}
}
```
**Disable** all rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"react": "none"
		}
	}
}
```
### React dependencies
Enabled when the following dependencies are declared:
- `react`: `>=16.0.0`

### React rules
Rules that belong to the domain:
- [noChildrenProp](/linter/rules/no-children-prop) (recommended)
- [noNestedComponentDefinitions](/linter/rules/no-nested-component-definitions)
- [noReactPropAssignments](/linter/rules/no-react-prop-assignments)
- [noRenderReturnValue](/linter/rules/no-render-return-value) (recommended)
- [useExhaustiveDependencies](/linter/rules/use-exhaustive-dependencies) (recommended)
- [useHookAtTopLevel](/linter/rules/use-hook-at-top-level) (recommended)
- [useJsxKeyInIterable](/linter/rules/use-jsx-key-in-iterable) (recommended)
- [useUniqueElementIds](/linter/rules/use-unique-element-ids)
- [noComponentHookFactories](/linter/rules/no-component-hook-factories) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [noJsxLeakedDollar](/linter/rules/no-jsx-leaked-dollar) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [noJsxNamespace](/linter/rules/no-jsx-namespace) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [noReactStringRefs](/linter/rules/no-react-string-refs) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [useReactAsyncServerFunction](/linter/rules/use-react-async-server-function) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [noJsxPropsBind](/linter/rules/no-jsx-props-bind)
- [noSyncScripts](/linter/rules/no-sync-scripts)
- [noDangerouslySetInnerHtml](/linter/rules/no-dangerously-set-inner-html) (recommended)
- [noDangerouslySetInnerHtmlWithChildren](/linter/rules/no-dangerously-set-inner-html-with-children) (recommended)
- [useComponentExportOnlyModules](/linter/rules/use-component-export-only-modules)
- [useReactFunctionComponents](/linter/rules/use-react-function-components)
- [noArrayIndexKey](/linter/rules/no-array-index-key) (recommended)
- [noDuplicatedSpreadProps](/linter/rules/no-duplicated-spread-props)
- [noLeakedRender](/linter/rules/no-leaked-render)
- [noReactForwardRef](/linter/rules/no-react-forward-ref)
- [noUnknownAttribute](/linter/rules/no-unknown-attribute)
## ReactNative
Use this domain inside React Native projects. It enables a set of rules that help catch runtime issues specific to React Native, such as rendering raw text outside of `<Text>` components.
### ReactNative activation
Enable the **recommended, non-nursery** rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"reactnative": "recommended"
		}
	}
}
```

:::note[No recommended rules]
Since all rules in this domain are nursery rules, no rules will be activated when enabling the domain. You need to enable the single rules.
:::
Enabled the **all** rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"reactnative": "all"
		}
	}
}
```
**Disable** all rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"reactnative": "none"
		}
	}
}
```
### ReactNative dependencies
Enabled when the following dependencies are declared:
- `react-native`: `>=0.60.0`

### ReactNative rules
Rules that belong to the domain:
- [noReactNativeDeepImports](/linter/rules/no-react-native-deep-imports) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [noReactNativeLiteralColors](/linter/rules/no-react-native-literal-colors) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [noReactNativeRawText](/linter/rules/no-react-native-raw-text) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [useReactNativePlatformComponents](/linter/rules/use-react-native-platform-components) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
## Solid
Use this domain inside Solid projects. This domain enables rules that might conflict with the React domain.
### Solid activation
Enable the **recommended, non-nursery** rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"solid": "recommended"
		}
	}
}
```
Enabled the **all** rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"solid": "all"
		}
	}
}
```
**Disable** all rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"solid": "none"
		}
	}
}
```
### Solid dependencies
Enabled when the following dependencies are declared:
- `solid`: `>=1.0.0`

### Solid rules
Rules that belong to the domain:
- [noSolidDestructuredProps](/linter/rules/no-solid-destructured-props)
- [useSolidForComponent](/linter/rules/use-solid-for-component)
- [noDuplicatedSpreadProps](/linter/rules/no-duplicated-spread-props)
- [noReactSpecificProps](/linter/rules/no-react-specific-props) (recommended)

{
	"linter": {

		}

}

{
	"linter": {

## Test
Use this domain when linting test files. It enables a set of rules that are library agnostic, and can help to catch possible misuse of the test APIs.
### Test activation
Enable the **recommended, non-nursery** rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"test": "recommended"
		}
	}
}
```
Enabled the **all** rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"test": "all"
		}
	}
}
```
**Disable** all rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"test": "none"
		}
	}
}
```
### Test dependencies
Enabled when the following dependencies are declared:
- `jest`: `>=26.0.0`
- `mocha`: `>=8.0.0`
- `ava`: `>=2.0.0`
- `vitest`: `>=1.0.0`

### Test globals
When enabled, the following global bindings are recognised by Biome:
- `after`
- `afterAll`
- `afterEach`
- `before`
- `beforeEach`
- `beforeAll`
- `context`
- `describe`
- `it`
- `expect`
- `run`
- `setup`
- `specify`
- `suite`
- `suiteSetup`
- `suiteTeardown`
- `teardown`
- `test`
- `xcontext`
- `xdescribe`
- `xit`
- `xspecify`

### Test rules
Rules that belong to the domain:
- [noExcessiveNestedTestSuites](/linter/rules/no-excessive-nested-test-suites)
- [noConditionalExpect](/linter/rules/no-conditional-expect) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [noIdenticalTestTitle](/linter/rules/no-identical-test-title) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [useConsistentTestIt](/linter/rules/use-consistent-test-it) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [useExpect](/linter/rules/use-expect) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [useTestHooksInOrder](/linter/rules/use-test-hooks-in-order) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [useTestHooksOnTop](/linter/rules/use-test-hooks-on-top) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [noDuplicateTestHooks](/linter/rules/no-duplicate-test-hooks) (recommended)
- [noExportsInTest](/linter/rules/no-exports-in-test) (recommended)
- [noFocusedTests](/linter/rules/no-focused-tests) (recommended)
- [noSkippedTests](/linter/rules/no-skipped-tests)
## Turborepo
Use this domain inside Turborepo projects. This domain enables rules that are specific to Turborepo projects.
### Turborepo activation
Enable the **recommended, non-nursery** rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"turborepo": "recommended"
		}
	}
}
```
Enabled the **all** rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"turborepo": "all"
		}
	}
}
```
**Disable** all rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"turborepo": "none"
		}
	}
}
```
### Turborepo dependencies
Enabled when the following dependencies are declared:
- `turbo`: `>=1.0.0`

### Turborepo rules
Rules that belong to the domain:
- [noUndeclaredEnvVars](/linter/rules/no-undeclared-env-vars) (recommended)
## Types
This domain contains rules that perform project-level analysis. This includes our module graph for dependency resolution. When enabling rules that belong to this domain, Biome will scan the entire project, *and it will enable the inference engine to resolve and flat types*. The scanning phase will have a performance impact on the linting process. See the documentation on our [scanner](/internals/architecture/#scanner) to learn more about the scanner.
### Types activation
Enable the **recommended, non-nursery** rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"types": "recommended"
		}
	}
}
```
Enabled the **all** rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"types": "all"
		}
	}
}
```
**Disable** all rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"types": "none"
		}
	}
}
```
### Types rules
Rules that belong to the domain:
- [useArrayFind](/linter/rules/use-array-find)
- [noBaseToString](/linter/rules/no-base-to-string) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [noFloatingPromises](/linter/rules/no-floating-promises) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [noMisleadingReturnType](/linter/rules/no-misleading-return-type) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [noMisusedPromises](/linter/rules/no-misused-promises) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [noUnsafePlusOperands](/linter/rules/no-unsafe-plus-operands) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [noUselessTypeConversion](/linter/rules/no-useless-type-conversion) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [useAwaitThenable](/linter/rules/use-await-thenable) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [useDisposables](/linter/rules/use-disposables) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [useExhaustiveSwitchCases](/linter/rules/use-exhaustive-switch-cases) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [useIncludes](/linter/rules/use-includes) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [useNullishCoalescing](/linter/rules/use-nullish-coalescing) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [useRegexpExec](/linter/rules/use-regexp-exec) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [useStringStartsEndsWith](/linter/rules/use-string-starts-ends-with) [(nursery)](/linter/#nursery)
- [useConsistentEnumValueType](/linter/rules/use-consistent-enum-value-type)
- [noUnnecessaryConditions](/linter/rules/no-unnecessary-conditions)
- [useArraySortCompare](/linter/rules/use-array-sort-compare)
## Vue
Use this domain inside Vue projects. This domain enables rules that are specific to Vue projects.
### Vue activation
Enable the **recommended, non-nursery** rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"vue": "recommended"
		}
	}
}
```
Enabled the **all** rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"vue": "all"
		}
	}
}
```
**Disable** all rules of the domain:
```json title="biome.json" ins={3-5}
{
	"linter": {
		"domains": {
			"vue": "none"
		}
	}
}
```
### Vue dependencies
Enabled when the following dependencies are declared:
- `vue`: `>=3.0.0`

### Vue rules
Rules that belong to the domain:
- [noVueDataObjectDeclaration](/linter/rules/no-vue-data-object-declaration) (recommended)
- [noVueDuplicateKeys](/linter/rules/no-vue-duplicate-keys) (recommended)
